## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation update

## Validation

- [ ] `cd frontend && npm ci && npm run build`
- [ ] `cd backend && mvn test`
- [ ] Manual verification completed

## Screenshots (if UI change)

Add screenshots or short recordings here.

## Checklist

- [ ] I followed `CONTRIBUTING.md`
- [ ] I updated docs as needed
- [ ] I added/updated tests where needed
